title: minuartia tenuifolia subsp. munbyi
intro: Minuartia tenuifolia subsp. munbyi, also known as Munby's thyme or short-petaled thyme, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae, native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Minuartia tenuifolia subsp. munbyi include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
